description: Product Description Enticing Visual Appeal Captivate your child's attention with our adorable bath sponges! With fun designs like frogs, rabbits and ducks, bathing will no longer be a chore. The bright colors and cute animal shapes make for a fun and enjoyable bath time experience. Handy Helper Our kids bath sponge is a perfect bath helper! It helps wash body quickly and easily while it exfoliates the skin. Its rich bubbles with body wash leave the skin smooth after every shower and bath. Gentle on skin This kids bath sponge is crafted with safety in mind using PE material. Its soft and comfortable texture is not harmful and won't cause any harm to children's skin. The sponge is also designed to last long without fading, making bath time a breeze.
